shortForecast: Partly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
name: Today
detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 4pm and 5pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny, with a high near 78. Southwest wind 2 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
